hltv.label: HLTV Rating
hltv.description: HLTV 2.0 overall performance rating combining kills, deaths, KAST, damage and impact. ~1.0 is average.

rating.label: HLTV Rating
rating.description: HLTV 2.0 overall performance rating combining kills, deaths, KAST, damage and impact. ~1.0 is average.

adr.label: ADR
adr.description: Average Damage per Round — how much damage you deal each round.

kast.label: KAST
kast.description: Percentage of rounds where you got a Kill, Assist, Survived, or were Traded.

udr.label: UDR
udr.description: Utility Damage per Round — grenade (HE + molotov) damage each round.

hs.label: Headshot %
hs.description: Share of your kills that were headshots.

far.label: FAR
far.description: First-Action Rating — performance in opening (first kill of the round) duels.

elo.label: ELO
elo.description: 5Stack matchmaking skill rating — rises and falls with wins and losses.

kda.label: K / D / A
kda.description: Average Kills / Deaths / Assists per match.

a.label: Assists
a.description: Total assists — you damaged or flashed an enemy a teammate then killed.

kd.label: K/D
kd.description: Kill/Death ratio — kills divided by deaths. Above 1.0 means more kills than deaths.

mkr.label: Multi-Kill Rounds
mkr.description: Rounds in which you got two or more kills.

cl.label: Clutch %
cl.description: Share of clutch situations (last player alive, 1vX) that you won.

cast.label: CAST
cast.description: Clutch attempts — the number of clutch (1vX) situations you were put in.

awp.label: AWP
awp.description: AWP usage / sniper role signal — how much a player relies on the AWP.

toasts.could_not_delete_clip: Could not delete clip. Try again.
toasts.reconnecting_description: Re-issuing the connect to the game server.
toasts.stream_switched_description: Pod reused — feed will repoint in a few seconds.
toasts.preview_reset_failed: Unable to preview tournament match reset
toasts.set_winner_failed_description: Selected lineup id is missing for this match.
toasts.hevc_missing_body: This video is encoded with HEVC (H.265). Your browser can't decode it — install the HEVC Video Extensions on Windows to enable playback:

render_queue_status.queued_waiting: Queued — waiting for a render slot

role_radar.radar_description: Filter by the role this player was in. Pin a comparison player to overlay them.
role_radar.no_data: Not enough recent matches to chart.

tournament_match_impact.delete_recreate: Match will be deleted and recreated

gpu_pool_status.no_nodes: No GPU nodes are currently available
gpu_pool_status.live_busy: GPU busy: a live stream is in progress
gpu_pool_status.demo_busy: GPU busy: a demo is being watched
gpu_pool_status.streaming_disabled: Live streaming is disabled on all GPU nodes
gpu_pool_status.demo_disabled: Demo playback is disabled on all GPU nodes
gpu_pool_status.rendering_disabled: Rendering is disabled on all GPU nodes

trophies.title: Trophies
trophies.no_trophies_description: Finish in the top 3 of a tournament to earn a trophy.

avatar.invalid_type: Only PNG, JPEG, or WebP images are allowed
avatar.hint: Drag & drop or click · PNG, JPEG, WebP · up to 5 MB
avatar.roster_hint: Drag & drop or click · head & shoulders, 400×420 · resized in the browser, then crop and remove background

roster_editor.title: Edit roster image
roster_editor.description: Crop to a head-and-shoulders portrait. Optionally remove the background for a transparent image.
roster_editor.notice_player: Used in matches when this player is not assigned to a team. In team-assigned matches the team's roster image is used instead.
roster_editor.notice_team: Used in matches when this player joins as part of this team. For solo / individual matches the player's own roster image is used.

system_metrics.no_services_found: No services match your current filters.
system_metrics.no_nodes_found: No game server nodes match your current filters.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.no_tournaments_description: Nothing live, scheduled, or recently finished.

filter.no_results_description: Try clearing filters or widening your search.

manage_tournaments.title: Manage Tournaments
manage_tournaments.description: View and manage all tournaments across the platform.

vetos.description: How this team approaches the map veto, and how each map performs once it reaches the server.
vetos.empty_description: This team has not completed any matches with recorded map vetos yet.

veto_sim.description: Estimate the likely veto outcome and map win chances against a chosen opponent, based on both teams' veto history.
veto_sim.estimate_notice: Estimate only — derived from historical veto tendencies, not a guaranteed outcome.
veto_sim.no_self_title: No veto history for this team
veto_sim.no_self_description: Simulation needs this team to have recorded map vetos first.
veto_sim.pick_opponent_description: Select an opponent team to simulate the map veto.
veto_sim.no_opp_description: The selected opponent has no recorded map vetos to simulate against.

api_keys_management.api_keys_description: API keys allow you to authenticate with the 5Stack API programmatically.
api_keys_management.create_new_description: Create a new API key with a descriptive label to identify its purpose.
api_keys_management.label: Label
api_keys_management.label_description: Choose a descriptive name to identify this API key.
api_keys_management.delete_confirmation_description: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{label}"? This action cannot be undone and any applications using this key will lose access.
api_keys_management.api_key_deleted_description: The API key has been deleted successfully.
api_keys_management.error_creating_description: Failed to create API key. Please try again.
api_keys_management.error_deleting_description: Failed to delete API key. Please try again.

copy_key_dialog.title: API Key Created
copy_key_dialog.description: Your new API key has been created successfully. Please copy it now as it won't be shown again.
copy_key_dialog.warning_message: This is the only time you'll be able to see this API key. Make sure to copy and store it securely.

unlink_dialog.title: Unlink Discord Account
unlink_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to unlink your Discord account? This will remove the connection between your 5Stack and Discord accounts.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure notification preferences for chat and other events.

chat_sound.title: Chat Sound Notifications
chat_sound.description: Play a sound when receiving new chat messages

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.telemetry_description: Help improve 5stack by sharing anonymous usage data.
telemetry.google_tag_manager_code_description: Google Tag Manager is a tag management system that allows you to manage and deploy tags on your website.
telemetry.analytics_section_description: Connect a third-party analytics provider to your platform.

matchmaking.title: Matchmaking
matchmaking.description: Matchmaking allows players to join a queue and be matched with other players.

fivestack_ranks.title: 5stack Ranks
fivestack_ranks.description: Send each player's 5stack ELO to the server so the plugin can display ranks in-game.
fivestack_ranks.warning_title: Warning: this can get your Steam GSLTs banned
fivestack_ranks.warning_description: Showing ranks uses plugin functionality that falls outside Valve's official server guidelines. Per Valve, this can trigger every Game Server Login Token (GSLT) on the server owner's Steam account to be banned. Enable at your own risk.

chat.title: Chat Settings
chat.description: Configure how long chat messages are retained.
chat.chat_message_ttl_description: How long (in seconds) chat messages are kept before being permanently deleted.

discord.title: Discord / Notifications
discord.support_section_description: The default Discord webhook and role used for support and invite notifications, plus your Discord invite link. Every other Discord notification below falls back to these when it doesn't have its own webhook or role set.
discord.webhook_description: We use this discord webhook to send notifications that require action from a player. Ex. match issues, bugs, etc.
discord.support_role_description: These roles will be pinged when used for support actions. You can add multiple Role IDs separated by commas. Get a Role ID from Discord by enabling developer mode, then right-clicking the role and selecting Copy ID.

match_notifications.title: Match Status Notifications
match_notifications.description: Configure Discord notifications for match status changes. These settings control both panel and Discord notifications.
match_notifications.webhook_description: Dedicated webhook for match status notifications. Falls back to the default webhook if not set.
match_notifications.role_id_description: These roles will be mentioned in match status notifications. You can add multiple Role IDs separated by commas.

gamedata_notifications.title: Gamedata Validation Notifications
gamedata_notifications.description: Configure where CS2 gamedata signature validation results are posted.
gamedata_notifications.webhook_description: Dedicated webhook for gamedata validation results. Falls back to the default webhook if not set.
gamedata_notifications.role_id_description: These roles will be mentioned in gamedata validation notifications. You can add multiple Role IDs separated by commas. Falls back to the default role if not set.

server_notifications.title: Server Notifications
server_notifications.description: Configure Discord notifications for game server nodes.
server_notifications.disk_warning_percent_description: Send a deletable notification when disk usage exceeds this percentage. Set to 0 to disable.
server_notifications.disk_critical_percent_description: Send a non-deletable notification when disk usage exceeds this percentage. Set to 0 to disable.

streaming.title: Streaming
streaming.minimum_role_to_stream: Minimum Role Allowed to Connect to TV (Delayed)
streaming.minimum_role_to_stream_description: GOTV broadcast — viewers connect to the delayed TV port (broadcast delay applies). Safe for casters and audiences.
streaming.minimum_role_to_spectate: Minimum Role Allowed to Spectate (No Delay)
streaming.minimum_role_to_spectate_description: Real-time spectator — connects directly to the game server with no delay. Restrict to trusted roles to prevent ghosting.
streaming.playcast_description: Enable Playcast over using TV ports directly.
streaming.live_video_codec_description: H.265 (HEVC) is ~30% smaller at matched quality and the default. Chrome and Firefox viewers fall back to the HLS path which carries HEVC fine; HEVC-over-WebRTC is Safari 17+ only. Switch to H.264 if your audience needs the lowest-latency WebRTC path on every browser. Falls back to H.264 automatically if the GPU lacks NVENC HEVC.

application.create_matches_role: Minimum Role Allowed to Create Matches
application.create_matches_role_description: This role will be able to create matches.
application.create_tournaments_role: Minimum Role Allowed to Create Tournaments
application.create_tournaments_role_description: This role will be able to create tournaments.
application.dedicated_servers_min_role_to_connect: Minimum Role to Connect to Dedicated Password-Protected Servers
application.dedicated_servers_min_role_to_connect_de: Only players at or above this role may connect to dedicated servers that require a password.
application.matchmaking_min_role: Minimum Role Allowed to Join Matchmaking
application.matchmaking_min_role_description: This role will be able to join matchmaking.
application.max_acceptable_latency_description: Players above this ping to a server are filtered out when picking the best server for a match.
application.lineup_add_without_invite: Minimum Role to Add Players to Lineup Without Invite
application.lineup_add_without_invite_description: This role will be able to add players to match lineups without sending an invite first.
application.auto_cancel_duration_description: Cancels a match that hasn't gone live (still in picking / veto / waiting) after this many minutes.
application.live_match_timeout_description: Safety timeout — a live match is auto-cancelled after this many minutes if it never finishes.
application.matchmaking_type_description: Toggle matchmaking for each type that will allow players to join matchmaking for this type of match.

players.force_name_registration_description: If forced to have player registration, the player will be required to submit a name that will be used on the platform.
players.refresh_all_description: Re-sync all player data in the search index. Use this if player information (like ELO) appears outdated or missing.
players.refresh_dialog_description: This will queue a job to re-sync all player data in the Typesense search index. This may take a few minutes depending on the number of players.

branding.brand_name_description: Displayed in the sidebar and page title.
branding.border_radius_description: Controls the roundness of buttons, cards, and inputs.
branding.show_separators_description: Display horizontal divider lines between sections.
branding.logo_description: Upload a custom logo for the sidebar. Recommended: square image, PNG or SVG.
branding.favicon_description: Upload a custom favicon. Recommended: square image, PNG or ICO.
branding.login_page_description: Customize the login page footer link.
branding.show_login_footer_description: Display a footer link on the login page.
branding.theme_colors_description: Customize the theme colors. Changes are previewed live.
branding.assets_section_description: Upload a custom logo and favicon for your platform.

fixtures.dev_only_notice: Fixtures are only available in development mode.
fixtures.load_description: Populate the database with sample players, teams, matches, and tournaments for testing.
fixtures.loaded_description: Fixture data is currently loaded in the database.
fixtures.load_dialog_description: This will insert 40 players, 8 teams, ~120 matches, and 4 tournaments into the database. This is sample data for development purposes.
fixtures.reload_dialog_description: This will delete all existing fixture data and reload fresh copies. Any changes you've made to fixture players, matches, or tournaments will be lost.
fixtures.remove_dialog_description: This will delete all fixture players, teams, matches, and tournaments from the database. This action cannot be undone.

servers.title: Server Settings
servers.enable_cpu_pinning_description: Enable CPU pinning on game server nodes for better performance
servers.number_of_cpus_per_server_description: Number of dedicated CPU cores assigned to each game server (only used when CPU pinning is enabled).
servers.reserved_disk_space_fresh_gb_description: Minimum disk space in GB required for a fresh node provisioning (CS2 not yet installed). Set to 0 to disable.
servers.reserved_disk_space_existing_gb_descript: Minimum disk space in GB required when CS2 is already installed on the node. Set to 0 to disable.

external_matches.title: External Matches
external_matches.enabled_description: Let players link their Steam match-history auth code to import official CS2 matches, and allow demo uploads. Turn this off to hide the auth-code form and block external imports.
external_matches.disabled_notice: External match importing is currently disabled by your administrator.

demo_settings.title: Demos
demo_settings.retention_storage_description: Demos are kept at least the minimum retention period. Once total storage exceeds the maximum, the oldest demos past their retention are deleted first.
demo_settings.max_storage_description: The maximum storage size for the demo files in GB.
demo_settings.cloudflare_worker_url_description: Optional Cloudflare Worker that proxies requests to your S3 bucket so demo + highlight downloads don't count against your bucket's egress (free Backblaze ↔ Cloudflare bandwidth). Leave blank to serve directly from S3.
demo_settings.min_retention_description: The minimum retention days for the demo files.
demo_settings.test_s3_description: Test the S3 connection and upload a file to the demo bucket.
demo_settings.demo_network_limiter_description: Caps the upload bandwidth a game-server node will use when transferring finished demo files to S3.
demo_settings.clips_retention_storage_description: Highlights are kept at least the minimum retention period. Once total storage exceeds the maximum, the oldest highlights past their retention are deleted first.
demo_settings.clips_min_retention_description: The minimum retention days for highlight clips before they can be auto-deleted.
demo_settings.clips_max_storage_description: The maximum storage size for highlight clips in GB. Oldest clips are deleted first when this is exceeded.
demo_settings.clip_video_codec_description: H.265 (HEVC) produces ~30% smaller files at matched visual quality and is decoded in hardware by modern Chrome, Edge, Safari, and iOS. Falls back to H.264 automatically if the GPU lacks NVENC HEVC.
demo_settings.clip_fps_description: Output frame rate for rendered highlights and manually-edited clips. 60 FPS is smoother but doubles the encode work and file size; 30 FPS is the lighter option.
demo_settings.clip_resolution_description: Default output resolution for rendered highlights and manually-edited clips. Users can still override per-clip in the render dialog. 1080p balances quality and file size; 720p produces ~50% smaller files. Both benefit when GPU nodes render at 1440p — the streamer supersamples that down to the selected output resolution.
demo_settings.clip_bake_branding: Bake player chip + outro into highlights
demo_settings.clip_bake_branding_description: Renders the player chip overlay and brand outro directly into the highlight file. Disable to ship raw captures without overlays.
demo_settings.auto_generate_match_clips_description: Queue a match-recap highlight for each player after their match finishes.
demo_settings.auto_generate_match_clips_imported_descr: Also auto-generate highlights for matches imported from outside 5stack (e.g. Valve match history). Off by default so imported matches don't flood the render queue.
demo_settings.pause_renders_during_active_match: Pause Highlight Renders During Active Match
demo_settings.pause_renders_during_active_match_descri: When a match goes Live on a server backed by a GPU node, auto-pause in-flight highlight renders so the game server isn't competing with the render pod for GPU. Renders resume automatically once the match ends.
demo_settings.auto_clip_default_visibility_description: Starting visibility for new auto-generated highlights.
demo_settings.default_hud_mode_description: Which JTs Hud Manager layout the game-streamer pod loads at boot for live streams, demo playback, and batch highlights. Streamers can still switch styles per-stream from the player controls.

update_map_pools.title: Automatic Update Map Pools
update_map_pools.description: Automatically add / update map pools when new maps are added or removed from the active duty pool.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the application interface.

matchmaking.title: Matchmaking Settings
matchmaking.description: Configure your matchmaking preferences and view region latencies.
matchmaking.max_latency_description: If no regions are preferred, matchmaking will only use regions with latency below this value.

show_match_ready_modal.title: Match Ready Popup
show_match_ready_modal.description: Show a popup when a match is ready for you to check in. When disabled, you can still check in from the button in the top nav.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.render_queue_description: Active and recently-finished render batches across the platform.

empty.try_widening: Try widening the filters or clearing one.
empty.try_different_admin: Try a different filter — or wait for new clips to render.
empty.check_back_soon: Public clips will appear here as they're rendered. Check back soon.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Regions allow you to group game servers by geographic location. Players can select preferred regions during matchmaking and veto undesired regions during match setup.

table.use_steam_relay_description: Enable Steam Relay for game servers to hide their IP address from the public.

delete.title: Delete Region
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this region? This action cannot be undone.

detail.source_all_unavailable_elo: "All" isn't available on the ELO tab — showing 5Stack ELO only.

external_warning.title: No match history linked
external_warning.description: Link your Steam match-history auth code to import your Premier, Competitive and Wingman matches.

roles.title: Preferred Roles
roles.description: Auto-detected from AWP usage, opening-duel involvement, and utility output across recent matches.
roles.no_data: Not enough recent matches to detect a role.

detail.no_elo_history: Play a match to generate ELO
detail.no_matches_description: Match history will appear here after playing games.
detail.no_matches_self_description: Jump into a match — your stats, ELO, and match history will start filling in here.
detail.no_tournaments: No tournaments found for this player.
detail.no_tournaments_description: Tournaments this player has joined will appear here.
detail.name: Name
detail.custom_window_active: Custom window active. Choosing a preset clears it.
detail.compare_vs_lifetime_description: Show lifetime totals alongside the window.
detail.exclude_tournaments_description: Skip tournament matches in stats and chart.

intro.empty_description: Detailed performance stats appear here once this player has finished and parsed matches.

maps.description: Career performance broken down by map, with terrorist and counter-terrorist side splits.
maps.empty_description: Once this player finishes matches, per-map performance will appear here.

weapons_table.empty_description: This player has no recorded weapon kills yet.
weapons_table.rounds_tooltip: Rounds with a kill using this weapon (we can't see rounds a weapon was only held)
weapons_table.rating_tooltip: Approximate rating from KPR + ADR + impact (no per-weapon deaths/KAST, so it's directional)
weapons_table.economy_tooltip: Weapon rating adjusted for buy cost — frags with cheaper weapons rate higher (~1.0 = on par for the price)

career_duels.description: First-kill-of-round outcomes across the last {count} maps.
career_duels.empty_description: This player has no recorded opening duels in their recent matches.

career_clutches.description: 1vX clutch situations across the last {count} maps.
career_clutches.empty_description: This player has no recorded clutch situations in their recent matches.

compare.label: Compare vs
compare.description: Overlays this player's numbers across every stats tab.

elo_history_dialog.title: {name} — ELO Detail
elo_history_dialog.description: Every match plotted at full resolution. The main page bucketed at this range for the trend; here you see each Δ.

not_party_leader.title: You're not the party leader
not_party_leader.description: Your party leader needs to join the matchmaking queue, create a custom match, or join another match below.

open_matches.description: Matches that are open lobbies for anyone to join.

open_registration_tournaments.description: Tournaments that are open for registration for anyone to join.

create_page.pick_up_game_description: A Pick up game does not require selection of teams.
create_page.intra_team_scrimmage: You can select the same team for both slots to create an intra-team scrimmage.

gpu_nodes.title: GPU Nodes
gpu_nodes.description: GPU-capable game server nodes that host live streams, demo playback, and highlight renders. Each GPU runs at most one consumer at a time.
gpu_nodes.cmdbar_sub: Live spectating · demo playback · highlight rendering
gpu_nodes.toggle_enabled_help: When off, the node is fully disabled — no GPU work and no match scheduling.
gpu_nodes.toggle_scheduling_help: When off, the node keeps running existing matches but won't accept new ones.
gpu_nodes.toggle_enabled_failed: Failed to toggle node enabled state
gpu_nodes.toggle_workload_failed: Failed to toggle GPU workload availability

bake.help: Pre-bake this node's Vulkan shader cache so the first match starts warm.
bake.logs_help: View the shader pre-bake job logs.

empty.title: No GPU Nodes
empty.description: No game server nodes have been registered with a GPU. Enable GPU support on a node to make it available for streaming and rendering.

steam_pool.title: Steam Accounts
steam_pool.description: Pool used by GPU nodes for rendering, demo playback, and live spectating. Each running pod holds one account, so the pool needs at least as many accounts as you have GPU nodes for full parallelism.
steam_pool.add_description: Account must have Steam Guard disabled. Username and password are stored as-is and injected into render pods.
steam_pool.empty_warning_title: GPU nodes are registered but the Steam account pool is empty — highlight renders and live spectating will fail until you add at least one account.
steam_pool.short_warning_title: Only {accounts} Steam account(s) for {nodes} GPU node(s) — some renders will queue waiting for an account.
steam_pool.delete_description: Any running pod using this account keeps its credentials and finishes normally. The account will be removed from the pool and not available for future jobs.

game_server_nodes.title: Game Server Nodes
game_server_nodes.description: Game server nodes expand your server offerings into different regions or provide redundancy for on-demand servers.

not_supported.title: Your Panel currently does not support Game Server Nodes.
not_supported.description: View the documentation to setup Game Server Nodes.

setup_dialog.title: Game Server Node Setup
setup_dialog.description: Run this installation script on your server to connect it to 5Stack
setup_dialog.waiting_description: Run the installation script on your server. The status will update automatically when the node connects.

dedicated_servers.title: Dedicated Servers
dedicated_servers.description: You can set up a dedicated server that will always run the game server mod

detail.config_location: This config should be placed in:
detail.no_players: No players currently on this server
detail.sanctions_wip: Kicks work today. Live mute/gag enforcement on public servers is a work in progress — a new 5Stack public server plugin is coming soon, and mutes/gags will apply automatically once it ships.

status.no_rcon: Server is connected but RCON is not available
status.connected: Server is connected and RCON is available
status.plugin_version_mismatch: plugin version is not up to date

delete_confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your server and remove associated data from our servers.

public_servers.title: Public Servers
public_servers.no_public_servers: No public servers available at the moment.

form.name: Name
form.name_description: This must match the name of the map in the game that the server recognizes.
form.label: Label

delete_confirm.title: Delete Map
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this map? This action cannot be undone.

error.invalid_workshop: Invalid workshop map ID. Please verify the ID exists on Steam Workshop.

manage_matches.title: Manage Matches
manage_matches.description: View and manage all matches across the platform.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.no_results: No leaderboard data available for the selected filters.

timescale.no_data_description: TimescaleDB extension is not installed or no hypertables are configured.

query_detail.title: Query Details
query_detail.no_explain_plan: EXPLAIN plan could not be generated for this query

custom_match.description: Build your own match with custom rules, maps, and lineups

account_settings.title: Account Settings
account_settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

system_update.title: System Update Available
system_update.note: Please note: It will take a few minutes to process and verify the new updates.
system_update.fix_link: If a system upgrade persists, you may need to fix your versions
system_update.panel_update: Your panel is out of date, pull and run the update script

logout_dialog.title: Logout
logout_dialog.description: Are you sure you want to logout?

lobby_panel.squad_description: Organize your team, send invites, and prepare for voice / Discord comms.
lobby_panel.create_lobby_description: Create a lobby to invite friends and queue together.
lobby_panel.next_step_description: Your squad is set. Jump into matchmaking or spin up a custom match.

chat_panel.no_chats_description: Once you join a chat, it will appear here.

recent_games.title: Recent Games
recent_games.no_maps: Maps will appear here as you play.
recent_games.no_recent_matches_description: Once you play some games, they will appear here.

install.title: Add to Home Screen
install.description: This website offers app-like features. Add it to your home screen for easy access.

common.manage_custom_plugins_and_shared_files: These files are moutned to `csgo` directory when the server is started.
common.your_schedule_description: Matches and tournaments you're currently part of.
common.are_you_sure: Are you sure you want to run this command?
common.name: Name

create_directory.title: Create New Directory
create_directory.description: Enter a name for the new directory
create_directory.label: Directory Name

create_file.title: Create New File
create_file.description: Enter a name for the new file
create_file.label: File Name

delete_confirm.description_file: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete_confirm.description_directory: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? All contents will be permanently deleted.

editor.title: Edit File: {path}
editor.description: Make changes to the file content
editor.unsaved_close: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?

upload.title: Upload Files
upload.description: Select files to upload to the current directory
upload.drag_drop: Drag and drop files here or click to browse

tree.drop_hint: Drop files here or right-click to create

details_panel.no_file_open_description: Select a file from the browser to edit
details_panel.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?
details_panel.unsaved_changes_all: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close all files?

tabs.unsaved_changes_warning: You have unsaved changes in other files. Are you sure you want to close them?
tabs.unsaved_changes_right_warning: You have unsaved changes in files to the right. Are you sure you want to close them?
tabs.unsaved_changes_left_warning: You have unsaved changes in files to the left. Are you sure you want to close them?

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

chat_page.not_open_title: This chat is not currently open in your session.
chat_page.not_open_description: Open it from the hub sidebar first, then pop it out again.

page.my_team_hint: Manage your roster, invites, and readiness for this tournament.

trophies_config.title: Trophy Configuration
trophies_config.remove_image_hint: Remove image to customize name or silhouette

tournament.paused_banner: This tournament is paused. No new matches will be auto-scheduled.

join.title: Join Tournament

elo_details.title: Elo Change Details
elo_details.team_avg_kda: Team Avg Kills + Assits / Deaths Ratio

formula.k_factor_hint: K-factor — base ELO swing rate before any modifiers.
formula.delta_hint: Δ = actual ({actual}) − expected ({expected}). Positive means you outperformed the team-ELO prediction.
formula.perf_hint: Performance multiplier — scaled by your KDA vs team average and your share of team damage. Bounded 0.8×–1.2× on wins.
formula.series_hint: Series multiplier — net map differential. BO1 = ×1, BO3 sweep = ×2, BO5 sweep = ×3. Closer series move ELO less.
formula.result_hint: Final ELO change after all multipliers, rounded to the nearest integer.

delete_confirm.title: Delete Match
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this match? This action cannot be undone.

accuracy.title: Accuracy (All Shots)
accuracy.description: Out of the total bullets you fired, how many hit an enemy.
accuracy.calculation: All hits divided by all shots.

accuracy_spotted.title: Accuracy (Enemy Spotted)
accuracy_spotted.description: Accuracy when you were actually shooting at an enemy in your field of view. Spam through smoke or walls is excluded.
accuracy_spotted.calculation: Hits on spotted enemies divided by shots fired while an enemy was in vision.

head_accuracy.title: Headshot Accuracy
head_accuracy.description: How many of your hits landed in the head. Excludes shots with AWP.
head_accuracy.calculation: Head hits divided by total hits (AWP excluded from both).

hs_kill_pct.title: HS Kill %
hs_kill_pct.description: Share of your kills that were headshots, as the scoreboard shows.
hs_kill_pct.calculation: Headshot kills divided by total kills.

time_to_damage.title: Time to Damage
time_to_damage.description: Average time from first seeing an enemy to dealing damage to them. Trigger-discipline / hold-angle plays are excluded.
time_to_damage.calculation: Per engagement, time from the rising-edge spot to the first damage on that enemy. Averaged across all engagements; capped at 3s.

spotted_acc.title: Spotted Accuracy
spotted_acc.description: How often you convert sightings into damage — measures engagement aggression, not aim.
spotted_acc.calculation: Spots that led to damage on the same enemy this round, divided by total spots.

crosshair_placement.title: Crosshair Placement
crosshair_placement.description: Average angle (degrees) your crosshair moved from first seeing the enemy until you hit them. Lower is better.
crosshair_placement.calculation: Per engagement, the angle between your eye direction at the moment of first spot and at the first hit. Outliers above 45° are excluded.

counter_strafing.title: Counter-Strafing
counter_strafing.description: How often you stopped before firing with a rifle. Only counts rifle shots at an enemy in vision; excludes movement while fully crouched.
counter_strafing.calculation: Rifle shots at a spotted enemy where speed was under 34% of the weapon's max, divided by all rifle shots at spotted enemies (not crouched).

spray_accuracy.title: Spray Accuracy
spray_accuracy.description: Your accuracy on the second and later shots of a burst — the shots where recoil matters most.
spray_accuracy.calculation: Hits attributed to spray shots divided by total spray shots. A shot is a spray shot if the same shooter fired within 250ms before it.

wasted_magazine_pct.title: Wasted Magazine %
wasted_magazine_pct.description: How often you reload with bullets still in the magazine. Lower is better — finishing the clip is more efficient.
wasted_magazine_pct.calculation: Bullets left in the mag at each reload, divided by (shots fired + wasted bullets).

trade_kill_opportunities.title: Trade Kill Opportunities
trade_kill_opportunities.description: Rounds where a teammate died while you were alive — i.e. you had a chance to trade.
trade_kill_opportunities.calculation: Distinct rounds in which at least one teammate was killed by an enemy while you were still alive.

trade_kill_attempts.title: Trade Kill Attempts
trade_kill_attempts.description: Enemies you killed shortly after they killed a teammate.
trade_kill_attempts.calculation: Kills against an enemy within 5 seconds of them killing one of your teammates.

trade_kill_pct.title: Trade Kill %
trade_kill_pct.description: How often you converted a trade opportunity into a trade kill.
trade_kill_pct.calculation: Trade kill successes divided by trade kill opportunity rounds.

traded_death_opportunities.title: Traded Death Opportunities
traded_death_opportunities.description: Your enemy deaths — i.e. each death was a chance for a teammate to trade for you.
traded_death_opportunities.calculation: Total times you were killed by an enemy.

traded_death_attempts.title: Traded Death Attempts
traded_death_attempts.description: Total trade attempts your team made on your deaths (a teammate killing your killer within 5s).
traded_death_attempts.calculation: Sum of every teammate kill that traded one of your deaths within 5 seconds.

traded_death_pct.title: Traded Death %
traded_death_pct.description: How often your deaths were avenged by a teammate.
traded_death_pct.calculation: Your deaths a teammate traded within 5 seconds, divided by total deaths.

net_trade.title: Net Trade
net_trade.description: Your contribution to your team's trade balance.
net_trade.calculation: Trade kills you completed minus your untraded deaths.

lineup.discord_user: This is a Discord user, register your discord id to enable stat tracking by typing

delete_confirm.title: Delete Invite
delete_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete the invite for {player} ({steam_id})? This action cannot be undone.

hltv.title: HLTV Rating 2.0
hltv.description: Composite rating from kills/round, deaths/round, assists/round, ADR, and KAST. >1.0 means above-average; >1.2 is elite, <0.85 is poor.

kast.title: KAST %
kast.description: Percent of rounds where you contributed: got a Kill, an Assist, Survived the round, or were Traded after dying. Pros average 70–80%.

survived.title: Rounds Survived
survived.description: Rounds you finished alive (didn't appear as the victim of any kill). Includes won, lost, and saved rounds.

cs2_options.title: Video Settings
cs2_options.description: Per-node video settings applied when this node hosts a live stream, demo playback, or batch highlight job.
cs2_options.section_video_description: Tune the rendering quality used while CS2 is captured on this node.

preset.title: Quality preset
preset.description: Auto lets CS2 generate the video config on first launch against the node's actual GPU. The Low / Medium / High presets apply explicit overrides on top of that.
preset.auto_active: Auto mode — CS2 will generate its own video config on first launch. The fields below are ignored until you pick another preset.

video.resolution_desc: Resolution CS2 renders at on this node. Capture always downsamples to 1080p before encoding — picking 1440p supersamples (renders 1440p → encodes 1080p), trading more GPU for sharper edges and cleaner anti-aliasing in the final stream/clip. Viewers see 1080p either way.

aa.label: Anti-aliasing
aa.description: MSAA renders multiple samples per pixel for clean geometry edges; CMAA2 is a cheaper post-process that softens edges but blurs the image. They're mutually exclusive.

video.shaderquality_desc: 0 = flatter and faster, 1 = complex highlights and reflections.
video.videocfg_shadow_quality_desc: Overall shadow detail. Higher tiers improve tactical visibility at the expense of FPS.
video.videocfg_dynamic_shadows_desc: Shadows cast by sun and players. Off saves FPS.
video.videocfg_texture_detail_desc: Texture resolution. Minimal FPS impact with enough VRAM.
video.videocfg_particle_detail_desc: Affects smoke, fire, and Molotov rendering. High improves molly visibility, lowers FPS.
video.videocfg_ao_detail_desc: Soft contact shadows. Competitive setups usually run this off.
